sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37151" key="e)ce/rama" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξέρ-ᾱμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n37151.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">vomit, thing vomited,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg022.perseus-grc1:2:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">2 Ep.Pet.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
